scenario: First passport for a minor applicant whose first parent/guardian holds sole legal custody — only one consent holder exists, so no second parent/guardian data is supplied. Regression fixture for the v1.1.0 fix: under the superseded v1.0.0 schema, the second-parent fields were incorrectly requiredWhen 'applicantIsMinor equals true' regardless of custody type, which would have rejected this genuinely valid, common sole-custody submission.

fields.applicantDateAndSignature: 2026-07-11, signed in person by sole-custody parent on the child's behalf
